title: Korak 1

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Click or tap on the card to edit your note.

Many languages have words that carry meanings so specific or culturally rooted that they can't be neatly translated into English. One example is the Japanese word "tsundoku", which refers to the habit of acquiring books and letting them pile up unread, something many book lovers can relate to. Another is the Portuguese word "saudade", describing a deep, bittersweet longing for something or someone that is absent. Meanwhile, the French word "Dépaysement" captures the disorienting yet exciting feeling of being in a new place, far from home. These unique words remind us that language is more than vocabulary: it's a window into the values, habits, and emotions of the cultures that create it.

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Your opening div tag should have the contenteditable attribute.
Your div element should have the contenteditable attribute set to "true".

description:
U ovom radionici, vežbaće se korišćenjem atributa aria-live i aria-label gradeći pristupačnu aplikaciju za beleške.

Već je dostavljeno većina HTML-a i sav CSS za vas. Prvih nekoliko koraka biće dodavanje preostalog markupa.

Ako pogledate pregled, postoji tekst koji vam govori da kliknete na karticu kako biste je izmenili. Ali ako pokušate to, neće raditi. Da učinite taj element div uređivnim, možete koristiti atribut contenteditable ovako:

<div contenteditable="true"></div>

U otvarajući tag div, dodajte atribut contenteditable i postavite njegovu vrednost na "true". Sada bi trebalo da možete kliknuti na element i izmeniti tekst.
